Package com.risk.mapeditor

package com.risk.mapeditor
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Country
    this is Country class for MapEditor
    CountryController
    Controller class for Country class in map editor Bounded with CountryEditor.fxml
    Edge
    this is Edge class for MapEditor
    MapEditor
    Driver class to start up map editor only
    View
    Model class for View (root_pane) in map editor In order to unify model.Model notify mechanism, implements Observer to receive file validation info
    ViewController
    Controller class for View object
    Writer
    this class is to generate standard map file
